images.alt:
A towering, humanoid creature stands in a narrow, rain-soaked urban corridor, partially obscured by mist and falling water. Its face resembles a pale, childlike mask with smooth, worn skin and large, hollow, dark eyes that seem to absorb light rather than reflect it. From its head and shoulders spills a tangled mass of cables, wires, and organic tendrils, forming a chaotic halo that merges machinery with decayed biological growth. The tendrils hang heavy and wet, some embedded with metallic segments and others appearing fibrous and root-like, as if grown rather than constructed.

The creature’s elongated torso leans forward slightly, giving it a predatory, curious posture. Its body is uneven and textured, with patches of corrosion, slime, and exposed mechanical elements integrated into what might once have been flesh. Droplets cling to every surface, emphasizing the damp, suffocating atmosphere.

Around it, faint neon-green holographic warning symbols flicker in the air, distorted by interference, suggesting a technological presence struggling to contain or identify the entity. The background shows blurred industrial structures and pipes, barely visible through the haze. The entire scene is tinted in cold teal and green hues, with subtle glitch-like distortions along the edges, reinforcing a sense that this creature exists somewhere between biology, machine, and corrupted data.

Keywords:
cyberpunk horror, biomechanical creature, corrupted AI entity, organic cables, dystopian alley, neon warning symbols, glitch distortion, wet textures, alien hybrid, dark sci-fi, haunting presence

AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A close-up portrait of a stylized dog resembling a whippet or greyhound fills the frame, its long, narrow snout and oversized, expressive eyes dominating the composition. The dog’s fur is patchy and textured, with a mix of off-white and deep orange tones that appear cracked, peeling, and almost sculptural, as if made from weathered paint or rough clay. The surface of its skin shows layered imperfections, chips, and flakes, giving it a tactile, worn quality. Its ears stand upright and slightly angled outward, also textured with jagged edges and irregular coloration. The eyes are large, glossy, and brown, reflecting light in a way that makes them feel alert and intensely aware, almost human in their emotional depth. Around its neck is a thick red collar, worn and slightly distressed, with a metal ring and tag hanging loosely, catching a bit of light. The background is an abstract, painterly field of teal-green with splashes and smears of red and dark tones, resembling graffiti or layered paint on a rough wall. The overall mood blends curiosity and unease, with the dog’s wide-eyed gaze suggesting both innocence and survival in a harsh, textured world.

Keywords:
dog portrait, surreal animal, textured fur, wide eyes, whippet style, distressed surface, red collar, abstract background, expressive gaze, painterly detail

AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A small, eerie fae-like creature crouches low against the thick trunk of a moss-covered tree in a dim, shadowed forest. The figure appears child-sized but unnatural, with elongated limbs and pointed ears that jut outward from tangled, mud-streaked hair. Her posture is compact and tense, one knee pulled close to her chest while her fingers grip the bark for balance. Her skin is pale beneath layers of dirt and forest debris, blending into the surrounding textures of damp moss, lichen, and rot. Her face is the focal point, tilted slightly downward but looking up with sharp, wary eyes that seem aware of the viewer. Strands of wet hair cling across her cheeks, partially obscuring her expression. Tiny glowing particles float in the air around her, like fireflies or spores, casting faint golden points of light that contrast with the cool green and blue tones of the forest. The background fades into soft blur, suggesting depth and dense foliage, while the foreground textures of bark and moss feel tactile and close. The atmosphere is quiet, damp, and tense, as if the forest itself is holding its breath.

Keywords:
dark fae, forest creature, moss texture, eerie portrait, glowing particles, crouched pose, pointed ears, woodland horror, natural camouflage, cinematic lighting

AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

Her expression is intense and volatile, eyes glowing with restrained anger and vulnerability, as if caught mid-breakdown or transformation. Her styling blends futuristic and organic elements—cosmic textures, deep purples, electric blues, and neon greens reminiscent of juniper tones and starfields. Lighting is harsh and directional with flickering highlights, as if the environment itself is unstable. Background is abstract and digital—shifting gradients, broken signal noise, and collapsing UI fragments. images.alt:
A haunting black-and-white, high-contrast portrait of an elderly, gaunt woman sitting at a cluttered wooden table. She is leaning forward with her chin resting on her interlaced, skeletal hands, her gaze fixed upward with an expression of intense, weary anticipation. She wears a tattered, dark headwrap and frayed, textured clothing that seems to blend into the decaying environment. On the table before her sits an old-fashioned circular scale with a clock-like face, a floral ceramic mug, and a melting, misshapen candle. The background is a claustrophobic, crumbling wall adorned with multiple antique clocks of varying sizes, all frozen at different times. The wallpaper is peeling in large, jagged flakes, revealing dark, mold-like stains beneath. A subtle, macabre element—a human skull—is partially visible in the shadows to the left. The lighting is harsh and directional, casting deep, cavernous shadows across the woman's deeply lined face and the derelict room, creating a sense of suffocating stillness and psychological decay.

Keywords:
elderly woman, antique clocks, decay, waiting, monochromatic, surrealism, scales, portrait, tattered clothing, macabre, stillness, shadows.

images.alt:
ALT TEXT (ES):
Retrato conceptual en blanco y negro con división vertical del rostro. El lado izquierdo muestra facciones jóvenes y piel tersa; el derecho, una piel envejecida con arrugas profundas y cabello canoso. El micro-contraste máximo unifica ambas mitades bajo una iluminación equilibrada, con grano Tri-X 400 que otorga cohesión técnica a la dualidad.

Esta entrega XXIV cierra la serie explorando la transición entre aprendizaje y maestría. La imagen representa a la artesana habitando simultáneamente su pasado y su presente de sabiduría. La integración de texturas es impecable, logrando una evolución natural. Es un estudio sobre el oficio como proceso vital, donde la juventud aporta energía y la madurez la técnica refinada. La ausencia de color subraya la universalidad de esta transformación, siendo un testimonio del tiempo invertido en alcanzar la excelencia silenciosa de una vida dedicada a la creación.

POST BODY (EN):
Conceptual portrait in black and white with a vertical division of the face. The left side shows young features and smooth skin; the right, aged skin with deep wrinkles and gray hair. Maximum micro-contrast unifies both halves under balanced lighting, with Tri-X 400 grain providing technical cohesion to the duality.

This twenty-fourth installment closes the series exploring the transition between apprenticeship and mastery. The image represents the artisan simultaneously inhabiting her past and her present of wisdom. The integration of textures is flawless, achieving a natural evolution. It is a study of the craft as a vital process, where youth provides energy and maturity the refined technique. The absence of color underscores the universality of this transformation, serving as a testament to the time invested in achieving the silent excellence of a life dedicated to creation.

【生成AIチャットボットと医療誤情報】 Gemini、DeepSeek、Meta AI、ChatGPT、Grokの5種に医療・健康系質問250問を投げた監査研究（BMJ Open, 2026）。 結果：約半数（49.6%）の回答が「問題あり」と判定。引用文献の正確性の中央値はわずか40%で、完全な参照文献リストはゼロ。可読性は全モデルで大学水準。拒否はたった2件（0.8%）のみ。 AIで健康情報を調べる前に、リテラシー教育と規制整備が急務です。 #誤情報 #AIリテラシー #医療AI #HealthMisinformation #GenerativeAI
